note: Microchannel-pullback refinement applied to 17 curated spike examples — 6 run on true 1-minute bars (the pullback found inside the 5-min spike, shown beside its 5-min spike), the rest on 5-min bars. 3 example(s) produced no qualifying first pullback. A study gallery, not a full-corpus verdict.
